title: crataegus oxyacantha subsp. oxyacanthoides
intro: Crataegus oxyacantha subsp. oxyacanthoides, also known as the hawthorn tree, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its flavonoids, oligomeric proanthocyanidins, and other bioactive compounds, which have been shown to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The health benefits of hawthorn include improved cardiovascular function, reduced blood pressure, and enhanced antioxidant defenses, making it a popular herbal remedy for heart-related issues and other conditions. Hawthorn can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects and promote overall health and well-being.
